resources.string: No watch connected. Make sure wBooks is installed on your paired watch.
Library is empty. Tap + to add a book.
Delete this book from the watch?
Delete folder and all books inside?
No folders yet. Use the folder button in the toolbar to create one.

PDF support is experimental.

• If the PDF contains real text, it will be converted and sent to the watch with basic formatting.

• If the PDF only contains scanned images, the result will be empty or garbled — there is no OCR.

Converted PDFs appear in your library marked [PDF] after the title.
